content:
---
title: Sales-Led Deal Linking
description: How the PMS links a booking to an existing HubSpot deal created during the sales process.
date: 2026-03-14
tags: hubspot, pms, sales-led, deal-linking, reservation, stage-progression, sync
group: flows
---

# Flow B вҖ” Sales-Led Deal Linking

> Covers [В§3.2 Flow B вҖ” Sales-Led](../hubspot-pms-sync-spec.md#32-flow-b--sales-led-pms-links-to-existing-deal) of the HubSpot вҶ” PMS Integration Spec.

## When This Fires

A deal already exists in HubSpot вҖ” created when the guest submitted an inquiry, paid a promo deposit, or entered the Reservation Pipeline via workflow automation. A sales rep works the deal through HubSpot's sales process, then creates a booking in the PMS and links it to the existing deal.

**Critical rule:** No new deal is created. The PMS links to and updates the existing deal.

---

```
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

---

## How the Deal ID Gets to the PMS

Three methods exist for linking a PMS booking to an existing HubSpot deal:

1. **Paste URL/ID** вҖ” Sales rep copies the HubSpot deal URL or ID into the PMS booking form.
2. **AI chat tool** вҖ” `create_booking` accepts an optional `hubspotDealId` parameter.
3. **Deep link from CRM card** вҖ” Sales rep clicks "Open in PMS" on the HubSpot deal page, which opens `https://pms.boltfarmtreehouse.com/bookings/new?dealId={dealId}&email={contactEmail}`. The PMS pre-fills the booking form from the HubSpot contact. (See Flow C for details.)

---

## Sync Behavior

When `syncBookingToHubspot()` fires:

1. Checks `booking.hubspotDealId`.
2. If set: calls `hubspotClient.crm.deals.basicApi.update(dealId, { properties })` вҖ” **updates the existing deal**.
3. If not set: creates a new deal (Flow A path вҖ” not taken in Flow B).

---

## Stage Progression

The Reservation Pipeline (ID: `873502775`) has these stages. A sales-led deal can pass through any of them.

```
HAPPY PATH
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Inquiry Made в”Җв”Җв–ё [Promo Deposit Paid] в”Җв”Җв–ё Booked Call в”Җв”Җв–ё Quote
     в”Ӯ                                                      в”Ӯ
     в”Ӯ                                                      в–ј
     в”Ӯ                                              Pending Approval
     в”Ӯ                                                      в”Ӯ
     в”Ӯ                                                      в–ј
     в”Ӯ                                                 Closed Won
     в”Ӯ                                                      в”Ӯ
     в”Ӯ                                            в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
     в”Ӯ                                            в–ј                   в–ј
     в”Ӯ                                       checked_in          (done)
     в”Ӯ                                            в”Ӯ
     в”Ӯ                                            в–ј
     в”Ӯ                                       checked_out
     в”Ӯ
EXIT PATHS (can occur from most active stages)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
     в”ңв”Җв”Җв–ё CL-Nurturing      (1309341807) вҶ’ creates deal in Nurture Pipeline
     в”ңв”Җв”Җв–ё CL-Not Qualified   (1309341808) вҶ’ lifecycle: Mountain Not Qualified
     в”ңв”Җв”Җв–ё CL-Blacklisted     (1309341809) вҶ’ lifecycle: Blacklisted
     в””в”Җв”Җв–ё Cancelled          (1309341806) вҶ’ moves deal to Recover Pipeline
```

Brackets around Promo Deposit Paid indicate it is optional вҖ” not all deals pass through it. Guests reach it by paying a deposit via landing page or having the "Rebooking Deposit" contact property checked. The stage auto-advances to Booked Call when a meeting is scheduled.

No Show (`1310267547`) is a holding stage off Booked Call. The deal returns to Booked Call once Stephanie re-sets the call and fills "Setter Assigned".

---

## Properties Written at Each Sync Point

The PMS writes deal properties on every booking status change. The following sections document what is written at each stage.

### Always-Written Properties (Every Sync)

These properties are computed and written on every call to `syncBookingToHubspot()`, regardless of which status triggered the sync.

```
SCHEMA: Always-Written Properties (every sync)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
dealstage                          : enumeration  = HUBSPOT_STAGE_MAP[booking.status].stageId
amount                             : number       = booking.totalAmount
gross_revenue                      : number       = booking.totalAmount
room_revenue                       : number       = nightlyRate * nights
total_add_on_revenue               : number       = sum(addons where category != room_revenue)
cash_collected                     : number       = sum(payments where status=succeeded, type!=refund)
refund_amount                      : number       = sum(payments where type=refund, status=succeeded)
revenue_generated_less_taxes__fees : number       = booking.totalAmount - sum(addons.taxAmount)
f_b_revenue                        : number       = sum(addons where category=f_and_b)
fee_revenue                        : number       = sum(addons where category=fee)
tax_revenue                        : number       = sum(addons.taxAmount)
quote_amount                       : number       = booking.quoteAmount
checkin_date                       : date         = booking.checkIn
checkout_date                      : date         = booking.checkOut
confirmation_number                : string       = booking.confirmationNumber
listing                            : string       = "{unit.code} - {unit.name}"
quote_expiry_date                  : date         = booking.quoteExpiresAt
hubspot_owner_id                   : enumeration  = booking.hubspotOwnerId (sales-rep bookings only)
```

> **Note on `confirmation_number`:** The spec requires PMS to write this field, replacing the legacy `snt_reservation_id`. However, live HubSpot data shows `confirmation_number = null` on sampled Pending Approval deals while `snt_reservation_id` is populated. See Open Questions.

> **Note on `listing`:** Written when a unit is assigned to the booking. May be null on early-stage syncs before unit assignment.

### Stage-Specific Details

#### Inquiry Made (PMS status: `inquiry`)

```
SCHEMA: Deal Properties Written at Inquiry Made
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
dealstage   : enumeration  = "1308814483" (Inquiry Made)
pipeline    : enumeration  = "873502775"  (Reservation) вҖ” deal creation only
dealname    : string       = "{guestName} вҖ” {confirmationNumber}"
deal_source : enumeration  = staff selection (if known)
+ all always-written properties (financial fields zero/minimal at this point)
```

**HubSpot automation responds:**
- Lifecycle stage вҶ’ Mountain Lead

**Staff does manually in HubSpot:**
- Sets `setter_assigned` (enumeration: Stephanie Potts, Klarice Fowler, Kara Bubolz, etc.)

---

#### Promo Deposit Paid (PMS status: `deposit_paid`)

```
SCHEMA: Deal Properties Written at Promo Deposit Paid
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
dealstage      : enumeration  = "1311051092" (Promo Deposit Paid)
cash_collected : number       = updated with deposit amount
+ all always-written properties (financial fields recomputed)
```

**HubSpot automation responds:**
- Auto-moves to Booked Call if a meeting is scheduled

---

#### Booked Call / No Show

These stages are **HubSpot-driven, not PMS-driven**. The PMS does not write properties at these stages.

- **Booked Call** (`1308814484`): Automatic when a meeting is scheduled on the sales team calendar.
- **No Show** (`1310267547`): Sales team moves the deal manually. Staff fills Deal Owner and Deal Source. Stephanie moves it back to Booked Call after re-setting the call and filling Setter Assigned. HubSpot auto-tasks Stephanie to chase.

---

#### Quote (PMS status: `quoted`)

```
SCHEMA: Deal Properties Written at Quote
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
dealstage        : enumeration  = "1308814486" (Quote)
checkin_date     : date         = booking.checkIn
checkout_date    : date         = booking.checkOut
quote_amount     : number       = booking.quoteAmount
quote_expiry_date: date         = booking.quoteExpiresAt
+ all always-written properties (financial fields recomputed)
```

**HubSpot automation responds:**
- Task for deal owner to follow up with guest (8 hours)
- Task to cancel quote and move deal to CL-Nurturing if expired

**SNT migration note:** The "Cancel quote in SNT" automation must be updated to reference the PMS or removed entirely вҖ” the PMS handles quote expiry internally. See spec В§2.2 and В§5.

---

#### Pending Approval (PMS status: `pending_approval`)

```
SCHEMA: Deal Properties Written at Pending Approval
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
dealstage                          : enumeration  = "1309405752" (Pending Approval)
confirmation_number                : string       = booking.confirmationNumber
checkin_date                       : date         = booking.checkIn
checkout_date                      : date         = booking.checkOut
gross_revenue                      : number       = booking.totalAmount
revenue_generated_less_taxes__fees : number       = booking.totalAmount - sum(addons.taxAmount)
cash_collected                     : number       = sum(payments where succeeded, not refund)
hubspot_owner_id                   : enumeration  = booking.hubspotOwnerId
deal_source                        : enumeration  = staff selection in PMS
+ all always-written properties (financial fields recomputed)
```

**HubSpot automation responds:**
- Task for admin to reconcile with PMS (replaces "Reconcile with SNT")

**Staff does manually in HubSpot:**
- Fills `closed_won_reason` (string, free text) вҖ” required before moving to Closed Won
  - Examples from live data: "35th Wedding Anniversary - Saw on Social Media", "Honeymoon - Saw FB Add"

---

#### Confirmed / Closed Won (PMS status: `confirmed`)

```
SCHEMA: Deal Properties Written at Closed Won
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
dealstage : enumeration  = "1308814489" (Closed Won)
+ all always-written properties (financial fields final)
```

**HubSpot automation responds:**
1. Creates deal in **Upsell Pipeline** (auto-copies reservation number, deal owner, dates, attribution)
2. Creates deal in **Rebooking Program Pipeline**
3. Sets task for deal owner: **265-day anniversary** special reminder
4. Sets contact lifecycle stage вҶ’ **Mountain Customer** (or Mountain Evangelist for repeat stays)

> These HubSpot-created deals (Upsell, Rebooking, Past Guest) are NOT tracked by the PMS. Phase 2 multi-deal support (`booking_deals` join table) is required for PMS management of these deals.

**Staff does manually in HubSpot:**
- Fills `stayntouch_reconciled` (bool) вҖ” legacy name, becomes `pms_reconciled`

---

#### Checked In (PMS status: `checked_in`)

```
SCHEMA: Deal Properties Written at Checked In
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
dealstage : enumeration  = "1308814489" (Closed Won вҖ” same stage, no visible change)
+ all always-written properties (may include new charges)
```

**HubSpot automation responds:**
- Rebooking Pipeline: creates new Rebooking deal on check-in

**PMS internal only:** Unit status changes, housekeeping triggers, guest experience layer activates.

---

#### Checked Out (PMS status: `checked_out`)

```
SCHEMA: Deal Properties Written at Checked Out
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
dealstage      : enumeration  = "1308814489" (Closed Won вҖ” same stage)
last_stay_date : date         = booking.checkOut  ** GAP вҖ” not currently synced **
+ all always-written properties (final folio)
```

**HubSpot automation responds:**
- Past Guest Pipeline: deal moves through time-based stages (<14 days, <90 days, COLD)
- Rebooking Pipeline: moves to Expired on check-out

> **Gap:** `last_stay_date` is critical for Past Guest pipeline timing but is not currently synced by the PMS. The spec (В§6.1) flags this as a required addition.

---

#### Cancelled (PMS status: `cancelled`)

```
SCHEMA: Deal Properties Written at Cancelled
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
dealstage      : enumeration  = "1309341806" (Cancelled)
refund_amount  : number       = sum(refund payments)
cash_collected : number       = recomputed after refund
+ all always-written properties (financial fields recomputed)
```

**HubSpot automation responds:**
- **Automatically moves deal to Recover Pipeline**
- Sets task for original deal owner to contact guest ASAP

**Staff does manually in HubSpot:**
- `cancel__reschedule_request` (string вҖ” free text request detail)
- `cancellationreschedule_reason` (enumeration: "48 Hour Cancellation", "Needs to Move Dates")
- `refund_noted` (bool вҖ” NOT `refunded`)

---

#### CL-Nurturing (PMS status: `nurturing`)

```
SCHEMA: Deal Properties Written at CL-Nurturing
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
dealstage : enumeration  = "1309341807" (CL-Nurturing)
```

Note: CL-Nurturing is a stage within the Reservation Pipeline, not a pipeline move. The HubSpot automation then creates a new deal in the Nurture Pipeline.

**HubSpot automation responds:**
- Creates new deal in Mountain-Nurturing Pipeline

**Staff does manually in HubSpot:**
- `loss_reason` (enumeration: Moved to Nurturing, Not Qualified, Blacklisted, Timing, Financials, Partner, Uncertain/Confused, Competitor, No Response, Other)
- `closed_lost_reason` (string вҖ” free text detail)

---

#### CL-Not Qualified (PMS status: `not_qualified`)

```
SCHEMA: Deal Properties Written at CL-Not Qualified
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
dealstage : enumeration  = "1309341808" (CL-Not Qualified)
```

**HubSpot automation responds:**
- Lifecycle stage вҶ’ Mountain Not Qualified

**Staff does manually in HubSpot:**
- `not_qualified_reason` (enumeration: Physical Restrictions, On Disability/Welfare ($), Only Travels with Pet/Kids)

---

#### CL-Blacklisted (PMS status: `blacklisted`)

The PMS writes **nothing** вҖ” sync is skipped entirely. If a deal already exists in HubSpot, it is not updated further.

**Staff does manually in HubSpot:**
- Sets `do_not_contact` on contact (triggers Blacklisted lifecycle stage)
- `blacklist_reason` (string вҖ” free text)

---

## Deal Name Format

The PMS sets the deal name at creation:

```
dealname = "{guestName} вҖ” {confirmationNumber}"
```

Live HubSpot data shows inconsistent formats from legacy/manual deal creation: "Mountain вҖ” Reservation | Paul Rentz", "New Reservation | Jim Rasmussen". PMS-created or PMS-linked deals should follow the spec format above.

---

## Deal Source

For sales-rep bookings, `deal_source` is set by staff selection in the PMS. Valid HubSpot enum values:

| Value | Description |
|---|---|
| Booked Call | Guest booked from a scheduled call |
| Inbound Call | Guest called in |
| LiveChat Lead | From website live chat |
| Concierge Call | Concierge-initiated |
| Nurturing | Re-engaged from nurture pipeline |
| Collecting Payment | Payment follow-up |
| Return Guest | Returning guest |
| Rebooking Program | From rebooking program |
| DMs | Social media direct messages |
| Spa Team | Spa team referral |
| On Site | On-site booking |
| On-Site Rebookings | On-site rebooking |
| Review | From a review interaction |

> **Note:** `online_booking` is NOT in the HubSpot `deal_source` enum. It must be added to HubSpot before Flow A (guest self-serve) can write it. This does not affect Flow B directly since sales-led bookings use staff-selected sources, but the PMS code should be aware of this constraint.

---

## Properties That Stay Manual in HubSpot

These properties exist on deals but are NOT written by the PMS. Sales staff fills them in HubSpot.

| Property | Type | Who Sets | When | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `setter_assigned` | enumeration | Sales staff | Inquiry Made / Promo Deposit Paid | Tracks which setter is chasing the lead |
| `closed_won_reason` | string | Sales staff | Pending Approval | Required for Closed Won transition |
| `loss_reason` | enumeration | Sales staff | CL-Nurturing | Close-loss reason enum |
| `closed_lost_reason` | string | Sales staff | CL-Nurturing | Free-text detail |
| `not_qualified_reason` | enumeration | Sales staff | CL-Not Qualified | Disqualification reason |
| `cancel__reschedule_request` | string | Staff | Cancelled | Free-text request detail |
| `cancellationreschedule_reason` | enumeration | Staff | Cancelled | "48 Hour Cancellation" or "Needs to Move Dates" |
| `refund_noted` | bool | Staff | Cancelled | Boolean flag (NOT `refunded`) |
| `stayntouch_reconciled` | bool | Admin | Closed Won | Legacy вҖ” becomes `pms_reconciled` |
| `blacklist_reason` | string | Staff | CL-Blacklisted | Free-text reason |

---

## SNT Migration Notes

These automations and properties reference StayNTouch and must be updated for PMS:

| Current | PMS Replacement |
|---|---|
| "Cancel quote in SNT" automation | PMS handles quote expiry internally вҖ” remove or update to "Quote expired in PMS" |
| "Reconcile with SNT" task | Change to "Reconcile with PMS" |
| `snt_reservation_id` property | Use `confirmation_number` instead |
| `stayntouch_reconciled` flag | Rename/repurpose as `pms_reconciled` or reuse existing property |

---

## Open Questions

1. **Why is `confirmation_number` null on all sampled Pending Approval deals?** Either (a) these deals were created manually without PMS involvement and staff uses the legacy `snt_reservation_id` field, or (b) the PMS sync is not yet writing `confirmation_number`. The transition from `snt_reservation_id` to `confirmation_number` is a spec requirement (В§1.3, В§5).

2. **Should the PMS collect `closed_won_reason` during the booking process?** The spec (В§6.2) lists it as optionally PMS-writable. Currently staff fills it manually in HubSpot at Pending Approval. If the PMS collected it, it would reduce manual data entry.

3. **Should the PMS collect close-loss reasons (`loss_reason`, `not_qualified_reason`, `cancellationreschedule_reason`) during status transitions?** The spec (В§6.2) lists these as optionally PMS-writable. Currently manual in HubSpot.

4. **Should the automations triggered at Quote and Pending Approval be documented as reacting to PMS property writes (which is what actually happens) rather than appearing as HubSpot-internal stage events?** The trigger mechanism is: PMS writes `dealstage` вҶ’ HubSpot workflow detects the property change вҶ’ automation fires.

5. **`last_stay_date` is not synced** вҖ” the spec (В§2.2, В§6.1) flags this as critical for Past Guest pipeline timing. When will this be implemented?
